    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    S

    schedule(Processor[], SystemProcess, MemoryManager, int, int, SimulationEngine) - Method in class simulator.core.Scheduler
    Ruleaza logica de planificare.
    schedule(Processor[], SystemProcess, MemoryManager, int, int, SimulationEngine) - Method in interface simulator.core.SchedulingStrategy
    Planifica procesele disponibile pe procesoarele libere.
    Scheduler - Class in simulator.core
    Implementeaza algoritmul de planificare Round-Robin cu afinitate pentru procesor.
    Scheduler() - Constructor for class simulator.core.Scheduler
     
    SchedulingStrategy - Interface in simulator.core
    Interfata care defineste contractul pentru algoritmul de planificare a procesorului.
    setLastProcessorId(int) - Method in class simulator.model.Process
    Seteaza ID-ul procesorului pe care ruleaza procesul in prezent.
    setState(ProcessState) - Method in class simulator.model.Process
    Actualizeaza starea procesului in sistem.
    showChart() - Method in class simulator.io.GanttChartGUI
     
    SimulationConfig - Class in simulator.config
    Clasa SimulationConfig stocheaza parametrii imuabili ai simularii.
    SimulationConfig(int, int, int, int, double) - Constructor for class simulator.config.SimulationConfig
    Construieste o configuratie completa pentru simulator.
    SimulationEngine - Class in simulator.core
    Motorul principal al simularii (The Clock).
    SimulationEngine(SimulationConfig, UserProcess[]) - Constructor for class simulator.core.SimulationEngine
    Construieste si initializeaza motorul de simulare.
    SimulationEventListener - Interface in simulator.io
    Interfață utilizată pentru a decupla motorul de simulare de sistemele de afișare.
    simulator - package simulator
     
    simulator.config - package simulator.config
     
    simulator.core - package simulator.core
     
    simulator.io - package simulator.io
     
    simulator.model - package simulator.model
     
    startLoadingProcessToRam(Process, int, SimulationEngine) - Method in class simulator.core.MemoryManager
     
    SWAPPING - Enum constant in enum class simulator.model.ProcessState
     
    SystemProcess - Class in simulator.model
    Reprezinta procesul de sistem (VIP-ul simulatorului).
    SystemProcess(int, int) - Constructor for class simulator.model.SystemProcess
    Construieste procesul de sistem.
